mapper.sql: ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY_CD, STATUS_CD, PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, ROOT_ISSUE, MEM_ID, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO, IS_ATTACH_CD
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, get_sub_code_name(CATEGORY_CD) as CATEGORY_CD, get_sub_code_name(STATUS_CD) as STATUS_CD, get_sub_code_name(PRIORITY_CD)as PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, ROOT_ISSUE, GET_USERID_TO_NAME (MEM_ID) as memName, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO FROM ISSUE
ORDER BY PRIORITY_CD DESC

SELECT ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, get_sub_code_name(CATEGORY_CD) as CATEGORY_CD, get_sub_code_name(STATUS_CD) as STATUS_CD, get_sub_code_name(PRIORITY_CD)as PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, ROOT_ISSUE, GET_USERID_TO_NAME (MEM_ID) as memName, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO FROM ISSUE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ISSUE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_ISSUE ( ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY_CD, STATUS_CD, PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, ROOT_ISSUE, MEM_ID, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO, IS_ATTACH_CD ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{prjId}, #{subject}, #{description}, #{categoryCd}, #{statusCd}, #{priorityCd}, SYSDATE, #{updatedOn}, #{estStartDate}, #{dueDate}, #{startDate}, #{closedDate}, #{parentIssue}, #{rootIssue}, #{memId}, #{lft}, #{rgt}, #{doneRatio}, #{isAttachCd} )
